articles.title: OpenAI Tells Mac Users to Update Apps After Software Supply Chain Attack
articles.description: OpenAI was hit by a supply chain attack involving hackers publishing a malicious version of Tanstack software used for web development.

articles.title: Why ₹4,900 crore is ‘vital’ to MMRDA and BMC
articles.description: Mumbai's transport agencies are in a funding dispute over ₹4,973 crore for vital projects like metro lines and coastal roads, impacting urban infrastructure.

articles.title: Noida Protest Accused Got Over Rs 1 Crore From Foreign Countries: Cops
articles.description: The law and order situation had deteriorated during violent protest in Noida in April.

articles.title: Ban on exports jolts state’s sugar industry
articles.description: The ban, imposed in the middle of the export season, will put on hold over 30% of the total 488,000 tonnes of sanctioned sugar quota for export

articles.title: Bar Kap opens at the House of Tan Yeok Nee with cocktails inspired by its storied past
articles.description: In one of Singapore’s most atmospheric heritage mansions, Bar Kap brings together clay-aged cocktails, Teochew-inspired details and intimate private rooms in a bar experience rooted in place.

articles.title: 'U.S. Behind Instability': Russia Slams Trump's Iran War; Bats For Gulf Stability | WATCH
articles.description: Russian Security Council Secretary Sergei Shoigu stated that the West has misappropriated assets belonging to other states worth over half a trillion dollars, speaking at a meeting of the Shanghai Co-operation Organisation (SCO) in Bishkek on Thursday. Shoigu expressed confidence that 'the leaders will draw the correct conclusions' about the risks of holding national savings in Western banks. Additionally, the Secretary of the Russian Security Council noted that the global situation continues to 'steadily worsen' due to the United States' desire to preserve its status as a dominant power. Watch.

articles.title: UP adopts curbs to save fuel, BJP state chief urges lifestyle changes
articles.description: Chairman of Uttar Pradesh Legislative Council Kunwar Manvendra Singh has postponed all previously scheduled tour programmes of the parliamentary committees of the council until further orders. Principal secretary, legislative council, Rajesh Singh confirmed district-level officials would participate in parliamentary committee meetings through video conferencing until further orders.

articles.title: Indian dhow attacked in Omani waters, crew rescued
articles.description: India News: NEW DELHI: Indian dhow — Haji Ali — sailing from Somalia to Sharjah in the UAE sank after coming under attack in Omani waters early Wednesday. Meanwhi.

articles.title: UGC NET June 2026 registration ends on May 20: Check direct link to apply and key details here
articles.description: The National Testing Agency has announced that the registration deadline for the UGC NET June 2026 examination is May 20, 2026. Candidates are urged to complete their applications and fee payments carefully on ugcnet.nta.nic.in before the closing time. Important details like name, category, and subject choices should be verified as corrections may not be permitted later.

articles.title: CM Fadnavis’ bike ride draws Opposition ire
articles.description: Maharashtra CM Fadnavis' bike ride sparks opposition criticism amid austerity calls, questioning the government's sincerity and measures post-election.

articles.title: Blackstone raises $1.75 bn in data centre REIT IPO
articles.description: Blackstone has successfully raised $1.75 billion through its initial public offering for a new trust focused on artificial intelligence infrastructure. This significant funding underscores strong investor interest in data centers driven by the AI boom. The trust plans to acquire established data centers valued between $250 million and $1.5 billion.

articles.title: Priorities and Challenges before Suvendu Adhikari government in WB
articles.description: After a massive mandate in 2026 Assembly polls, the task for the BJP govt in WB is to create employment, bring in industries and maintain law and order.

articles.title: Who is Golshifteh Farahani? Iranian actress suddenly pulled into French President Emmanuel Macron’s viral ‘slap-gate’ firestorm
articles.description: A new book by journalist Florian Tardif has sparked online debate concerning French President Emmanuel Macron and First Lady Brigitte Macron. Claims within the book suggest private messages were exchanged between Emmanuel Macron and actress Golshifteh Farahani, with some social media users linking this to a viral video of Brigitte Macron. These discussions remain unconfirmed.

articles.title: MP pushes solar beyond sunset with battery and hydro-backed storage
articles.description: 250 MW Green Project Expected To Provide Assured Power During Peak Demand Hours

articles.description: Gujarat government approves Rs 330 crore for new schools and infrastructure development

articles.title: ACB court issues notice to KTR in Formula E case
articles.description: ACB court issues notices to KTR, Arvind Kumar and others in Hyderabad Formula E case over alleged Rs 55 crore diversion to UK-based FEO, corruption charges.

articles.title: 25 objections to DDCET answer key under review
articles.description: DDCET provisional answer key released; 25 objections under expert review. Final results expected by end of May; admissions registration likely in June.

articles.title: Roads, green belts still occupied as anti-encroachment drive fails to restart
articles.description: Roads, green belts still occupied as anti-encroachment drive fails to restart

articles.title: 'I Won't Be Scared': HC Judge Swarana Sharma Initiates Contempt Action Against Kejriwal
articles.description: The remarks came during proceedings in the excise policy case, where the bench has been hearing challenges and related applications involving multiple accused.

articles.title: Thoothukudi police launch foot patrol to curb crimes
articles.description: Thoothukudi police launch foot patrol to curb crimes

articles.title: Iran war effect: Leading EV two-wheeler makers accelerate expansion amid petrol price worries
articles.description: Major electric scooter companies are rapidly increasing production capacity. This expansion aims to meet a surge in demand for eco-friendly vehicles. Combined monthly output is expected to nearly double by the end of the fiscal year. This signals a shift towards mass-market adoption. Companies are navigating challenges while betting on strong future growth.

articles.title: BJP alleges crop procurement failures in Telangana; calls for urgent farmer relief
articles.description: BJP alleges crop procurement failures in Telangana; calls for urgent farmer relief

articles.title: Free and fair elections can happen only if there are independent Election Commissioners, SC says
articles.description: Supreme Court emphasizes the need for independent Election Commissioners to ensure free and fair elections, questioning the current selection process.

articles.title: RFBL Flexi Pack IPO subscribed 20.44 times on final day
articles.description: RFBL Flexi Pack IPO | The Gujarat-based printed multilayer flexible packaging material company is raising Rs 35.33 crore via initial public offering of 70.65 lakh shares.

articles.title: 'Kejriwal orchestrated vilification campaign': HC judge Swarana Sharma on contempt petition
articles.description: Justice Sharma had earlier refused to allow Kejriwal's plea wherein he had sought her recusal from hearing the CBI's appeal against his discharge.

articles.title: VMRDA to allot ₹9.9 crores for development works in Vizianagaram
articles.description: VMRDA approves ₹9.9 crores for development projects in Vizianagaram, focusing on parks, roads, and airport connectivity.

articles.title: Foreign Borrowing Filings Halve To $5.43 Billion In March Amid Market Volatility
articles.description: Data suggested that there were 19 filings for new projects totalling a borrowing of $1.14 billion.

articles.title: Test Twenty: New 80-over format introduces mixed-gender Parity Rule
articles.description: Cricket introduces Test Twenty, a revolutionary 80-over format with a Parity Rule for mixed-gender play. Men's and women's squads will compete under one franchise for a single championship, marking a landmark moment for global sport inclusion.

articles.title: Inspired by Vijay’s ‘Thamizhan’, Chennai man donates ₹22,674 to CM Relief Fund
articles.description: Chennai-based Arun Loganathan has been inspired by a Tamil film starring Vijay and has donated ₹22,674 to CM Relief Fund

articles.title: TDB backs Helix Cell's novel CAR T-cell therapy for Multiple Myeloma
articles.description: The Technology Development Board (TDB) has partnered with Helix Cell Therapeutics for a Phase I clinical trial of a new dual-targeting CAR T-cell therapy. The Indo-Singapore project aims to develop an advanced treatment for Multiple Myeloma.

articles.title: US aid cuts harm global human rights movement, says Human Rights Watch
articles.description: A Human Rights Watch report says the US government's 2025 foreign aid cuts harmed the global human rights movement. Titled 'Every Autocrat's Dream', it details how the cuts halted investigations and support for victims in 16 countries.

articles.title: Nityanand Rai cuts convoy in Bihar, follows PM Modi's fuel-saving plea
articles.description: Following PM Modi's appeal to conserve fuel, Union Minister Nityanand Rai has asked Bihar to reduce his security convoy to just two vehicles. Other ministers and CMs have also downsized their convoys in a bid to save petrol and diesel.

articles.title: VD Satheesan appointed Kerala Congress CLP leader, AICC team to visit
articles.description: VD Satheesan has been named the new Kerala Congress Legislative Party leader. AICC observers confirmed the decision followed wide consultations and will visit Thiruvananthapuram. Satheesan thanked Rahul Gandhi and called for a collective effort.

articles.title: Public support outweighs seniority: V D Satheesan emerges winner in Kerala CM race
articles.description: Kerala CM: Congress named VD Satheesan as Chief Minister after weighing public support, UDF backing and his leadership in Opposition. Rahul Gandhi, Mallikarjun Kharge and allies including Muslim League were part of the final consultations in Delhi.

articles.title: EC Orders Phase III Of Special Intensive Revision In 16 States, 3 UTs; Himachal, J&K, Ladakh Excluded
articles.description: Election Commission of India launches SIR Phase III in 16 States and 3 UTs, 3.94 lakh BLOs to visit 36.73 crore electors, excluding Himachal Pradesh, Jammu and Kashmir, Ladakh

articles.title: Scientists Reveal How Many Hours Of Sleep Could Keep You Younger
articles.description: Changing sleep habits could help reduce risk of age-related disease.

articles.title: SC slams Rajasthan over illegal sand mining in Chambal Sanctuary
articles.description: The Supreme Court slammed Rajasthan authorities for failing to curb rampant illegal sand mining in the National Chambal Sanctuary. It summoned top officials to explain the unchecked violations and the threat posed to endangered wildlife like gharials.

articles.title: No OTP, No Escape - Delhi Traffic Police Close This Ultimate Challan Loophole
articles.description: Delhi Traffic Police has introduced mandatory on-the-spot OTP verification for traffic violations, preventing evasion through fake phone numbers. Officers now require verbal code confirmation before issuing tickets.

articles.title: Vedanta shares extend winning streak to 4th day, hit 52-week high
articles.description: Vedanta shares hit a 52-week high of Rs 336 on the BSE in early Thursday trade, surging as much as 4% in early trade. The stock extended the optimism from the previous session, where it settled nearly 6% higher at Rs 323.10 apiece.

articles.title: IT Stocks Extend Decline For Fourth Straight Session Amid AI, Growth Concerns
articles.description: The continued declines in the tech shares has pushed the Nifty IT Index more than 40% below its all-time high reached in December 2024.

articles.title: Oklahoma man to be executed for killing ex-girlfriend, her 7-month-old daughter
articles.description: Raymond Johnson, 52, was scheduled to receive a lethal injection at the Oklahoma State Penitentiary.

articles.title: Bengaluru Techies To Pay For Office Parking Now? New Proposal To Fix ORR Traffic Problem
articles.description: Employees of offices along Bengaluru's ORR corridor could be asked to pay for parking inside the tech parks if a new proposal by Bengaluru Traffic Police moves forward

articles.title: Despite Q4 net profit crash, Cipla shares rise 11% in two days: Factors behind the rally
articles.description: Cipla share price today: Cipla shares rose 11% in two sessions from Rs 1292 on May 12 to Rs 1432 in the current session. In today's session, the stock surged 8% intra day. Market cap of the firm rose to Rs 1.14 lakh crore.

articles.title: Despite Q4 profit crash, Cipla shares rise 11% in two sessions: Factors behind the rally

articles.title: UP braces for fresh storms: IMD issues rain warnings for 38 districts; Lucknow, Kanpur on orange alert
Drinking 2 to 3 cups of coffee or tea daily can lower dementia risk by 35%, study finds
articles.description: Moderate consumption of caffeinated coffee or tea can help reduce the risk of dementia, particularly in people under the age of 75, claims a new study. Researchers say 2 to 3 cups a day offers the strongest protection, while excessive caffeine showed no added benefit.

articles.title: Adani Enterprises jumps 7%, hits 52-week high; stock up 52% from March low
articles.description: Adani Enterprises stock hit a 52-week high of ₹2,665 and quoted 48 per cent higher against its rights issue price of ₹1,800 per share.
